## TabLayoutable.layout() method

Called when the tab is to be relayouted within the specified area.

**Signature:**

```typescript
layout(area: FrameRectangle, widgets: WidgetMap): Size;
```

## Parameters

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

area


</td><td>

FrameRectangle


</td><td>

The positional area where the tab's widgets are expected to be layed out.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

widgets


</td><td>

[WidgetMap](./openrct2-flexui.widgetmap.md)


</td><td>

A set of widgets that should be layed out over the area.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
**Returns:**

Size

The actual size the tab layout ended up being.
